name: Mini Apple Pizzas
recipeInstructions:
1. Pat the biscuits into 3-1/2 inch circles and place them on a lightly greased baking sheet.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine brown sugar, flour, and cinnamon. Mix well.
3. Add the apples to the mixture and mix thoroughly.
4. Spoon rounded tablespoonfuls of the apple filling onto each biscuit.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 15-20 minutes, or until the edges begin to brown.
6. If desired, sprinkle each pizza with 1 tablespoon of cheese.
7. Serve warm.
